trigger: Bryan asked to delete all project automation and rebuild from scratch so every listed QoL item receives at least three daily passes, spread across individual automations to control token pressure.
changes: Deleted prior seven active 20x category automation TOMLs from the active local Codex registry.
Created ten active QoL automation TOMLs with exact 3x/day schedules.
Regenerated prompt snapshots and removed stale Senior Capstone prompt snapshots.

Updated automation cadence, runbook, master plan, self-improvement protocol, memory, backlog/handoff owner notes, daily/weekly reporting notes, artifact registry, decision log, audit log, and run log.
Updated the contract checker so future automation drift fails fast.
verification: Automation contract checker passed for 10 QoL automations.

Checker enforces no stale Senior Capstone TOMLs, exact 30-start/day schedule, no overlap, at least 45 minutes between starts, prompt fragments, full MVP coverage, JSON parse checks, and non-interactive project scripts.
self_improvement: Updated local automation prompts, prompt snapshot generation, and the contract checker because Bryan changed the automation operating contract to ten QoL runners with at least three daily passes per target.
